title: reqwest -- HTTP Client
description: A high-level, ergonomic HTTP client for Rust. Built on top of hyper and tokio, reqwest supports async and blocking requests, TLS, JSON serialization, cookies, proxies, and multipart uploads. It is the go-to HTTP client crate.

commonPatterns.title: POST with JSON body
Reusable client with headers
Error handling with status checks
Blocking (synchronous) client

whenToUse: Any time you need to make HTTP requests: calling REST APIs, downloading files, web scraping, or interacting with web services.
alternatives: ureq (blocking only, no async, minimal dependencies), hyper (low-level, more control), surf (async-std ecosystem), isahc (curl-based).
